mapper.sql: SELECT c.客户编码, c.企业名称, c.统一社会信用代码, c.地址, c.电话, c.法定代表人, c.联系人, c.联系电话, c.曾用名, c.客户状态, c.业务员编码, c.创建人编码, c.备注, c.创建时间, c.更新时间, owner.员工姓名 AS ownerEmployeeName, creator.员工姓名 AS creatorName FROM CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE owner ON c.业务员编码 = owner.员工编码 LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE creator ON c.创建人编码 = creator.员工编码
mapper.select: WHERE c.统一社会信用代码 = #{creditCode}
WHERE c.统一社会信用代码 = #{creditCode}

where.if: AND (c.企业名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%') OR c.曾用名 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%'))
AND c.统一社会信用代码 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{creditCode}, '%')
AND CAST(c.客户编码 AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND (owner.员工姓名 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ownerEmployee}, '%') OR CAST(c.业务员编码 AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ownerEmployee}, '%'))
AND c.联系电话 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
AND c.法定代表人 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{legalRepresentative}, '%')

choose.when:
ORDER BY
c.客户编码 c.企业名称 c.统一社会信用代码 c.电话 c.地址 c.法定代表人 c.联系人 c.联系电话 c.曾用名 c.客户状态 c.业务员编码 c.备注 c.创建时间 c.更新时间 c.更新时间
ASC DESC DESC
, c.客户编码 DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY c.更新时间 DESC, c.客户编码 DESC

where.if: AND (c.企业名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%') OR c.曾用名 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%'))
AND c.统一社会信用代码 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{creditCode}, '%')
AND CAST(c.客户编码 AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND (owner.员工姓名 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ownerEmployee}, '%') OR CAST(c.业务员编码 AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ownerEmployee}, '%'))
AND c.联系电话 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
AND c.法定代表人 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{legalRepresentative}, '%')

choose.when:
ORDER BY
c.客户编码 c.企业名称 c.统一社会信用代码 c.电话 c.地址 c.法定代表人 c.联系人 c.联系电话 c.曾用名 c.客户状态 c.业务员编码 c.备注 c.创建时间 c.更新时间 c.更新时间
ASC DESC DESC
, c.客户编码 DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY c.更新时间 DESC, c.客户编码 DESC

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER ( 企业名称, 统一社会信用代码, 地址, 电话, 法定代表人, 联系人, 联系电话, 曾用名, 客户状态, 业务员编码, 创建人编码, 备注, 创建时间, 更新时间 ) VALUES
( #{item.enterpriseName}, #{item.creditCode}, #{item.address}, #{item.phone}, #{item.legalRepresentative}, #{item.contactPerson}, #{item.contactPhone}, #{item.formerNames}, #{item.customerStatus}, #{item.ownerEmployeeId}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT 统一社会信用代码 FROM CUSTOMER WHERE 统一社会信用代码 IN
#{code}

SELECT NULL AS 客户编码, customer_name AS 企业名称, MAX(credit_code) AS 统一社会信用代码, MAX(address_val) AS 地址, NULL AS 电话, MAX(legal_rep) AS 法定代表人, MAX(contact_person) AS 联系人, MAX(contact_phone) AS 联系电话, NULL AS 曾用名, '临时客户' AS 客户状态, CAST(MAX(owner_emp_id) AS UNSIGNED) AS 业务员编码, NULL AS 创建人编码, MAX(remark_val) AS 备注, NULLIF(MAX(snapshot_time), 'null') AS 创建时间, NULLIF(MAX(snapshot_time), 'null') AS 更新时间, NULL AS ownerEmployeeName, NULL AS creatorName FROM ( SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.customerName')) AS customer_name, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.creditCode')) AS credit_code, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.address')) AS address_val, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.legalRepresentative')) AS legal_rep, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.contactPerson')) AS contact_person, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.contactPhone')) AS contact_phone, JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.ownerEmployeeId') AS owner_emp_id, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.remark')) AS remark_val, NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.snapshotTime')), 'null') AS snapshot_time FROM CONTRACT WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.customerType')) = 'TEMPORARY'
AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.customerName')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%')
UNION ALL SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.customerName')) AS customer_name, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.creditCode')) AS credit_code, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.address')) AS address_val, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.legalRepresentative')) AS legal_rep, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.contactPerson')) AS contact_person, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.contactPhone')) AS contact_phone, JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.ownerEmployeeId') AS owner_emp_id, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.remark')) AS remark_val, NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.snapshotTime')), 'null') AS snapshot_time FROM QUOTATION WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.customerType')) = 'TEMPORARY'
AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(customer_snapshot, '$.customerName')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%')
) AS temp_customers WHERE customer_name IS NOT NULL AND customer_name != '' GROUP BY customer_name ORDER BY MAX(snapshot_time) DESC LIMIT 20
